message:
fix(trace,tls): Correct variable bindings in replay tests + TLS shutdown migration

trace/replay.rs:
- Swap _bytes/bytes bindings: the round-trip test that deserializes
  needs the variable (was prefixed with _ suppressing the use), while
  the tamper test that manually constructs invalid bytes does not
- Replace vec collect + len with iter().count() (no allocation needed)

tls_conformance.rs:
- Hoist AsyncReadExt/AsyncWriteExt imports to module level
- Migrate .close() → .shutdown() to match the current VirtualTcpStream
  async write half API (close was removed in favor of AsyncWriteExt::shutdown)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
